mapper.select: SELECT i.intersection_id, i.name, CAST(i.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS latitude, CAST(i.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS longitude FROM intersection i ORDER BY i.intersection_id
SELECT i.intersection_id, i.name, CAST(i.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS latitude, CAST(i.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS longitude FROM intersection i WHERE i.intersection_id = #{id}

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at), 'HH24:MI') AS hour, COUNT(*) AS vehicle_count, ROUND(AVG(speed)::numeric, 1) AS avg_speed, CASE WHEN AVG(speed) >= 40 THEN 'SMOOTH' WHEN AVG(speed) >= 25 THEN 'SLOW' ELSE 'CONGESTED' END AS congestion_level FROM traffic_flow_log WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_intersections FROM intersection i
